typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	DestinationTable as string (),
	PackageExecutionID as integer (),
	RowsDeleted as integer (),
	RowsDiscarded as integer (),
	RowsInserted as integer (),
	RowsNotWrittenError as integer (),
	RowsReadError as integer (),
	RowsReadNoError as integer (),
	RowsUpdated as integer (),
	FTPProductsDestinationPath as string (),
	ParentPackageExecutionId as integer (),
	ProductsDestinationPath as string ()
}

source(output(
		id as integer,
		name as string,
		type as string,
		sku as string,
		weight as integer,
		price as integer,
		costPrice as integer,
		retailPrice as integer,
		salePrice as integer,
		calculatedPrice as integer,
		totalSold as integer,
		isVisible as boolean,
		availability as string,
		condition as string,
		viewCount as integer,
		baseVariantId as integer,
		dateCreated as timestamp,
		dateUpdated as timestamp,
		distributorSource as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false) ~> Products
Products derive(id = id) ~> PlaceHolderRowsReadNoError
Products derive() ~> ProductsErrorReformat
PlaceHolderRowsReadNoError derive(ETLCreateDate = currentDate(),
		ETLExecutionID = $User__PackageExecutionID,
		SourceSystemId = $Project__SourceSystemId) ~> AddDerivedColumns
ProductsErrorReformat derive() ~> Products0
AddDerivedColumns sink(input(
		calculatedPrice as integer,
		ETLCreateDate as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		salePrice as integer,
		costPrice as integer,
		weight as integer,
		dateModified as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		isVisible as boolean,
		fullfillmentPartnerCode as string,
		availability as string,
		type as string,
		SourceSystemId as long,
		totalSold as integer,
		condition as string,
		dateCreated as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		baseVariantId as integer,
		price as integer,
		name as string,
		ETLExecutionId as long,
		id as integer,
		viewCount as integer,
		sku as string,
		retailPrice as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		calculatedPrice,
		ETLCreateDate,
		salePrice,
		costPrice,
		weight,
		dateModified = dateUpdated,
		isVisible,
		fullfillmentPartnerCode = distributorSource,
		availability,
		type,
		SourceSystemId,
		totalSold,
		condition,
		dateCreated,
		baseVariantId,
		price,
		name,
		ETLExecutionId = ETLExecutionID,
		id,
		viewCount,
		sku,
		retailPrice)) ~> ProductsTable
Products0 sink(input(
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	saveOrder: 10000,
	mapColumn()) ~> ProductsERROROUTPUTFILE
